title: Martin Shkreli Is Down for AI to Take Over
summary: A brief conversation about AI consciousness and the Turing test, where the guest expresses views on the human mind being a classical computer and identifies as part of the effective acceleration movement, accepting potential AI dominance.

key_claims.claim: The human mind is basically a classical computer and a fairly insignificant one
Trying to stop AI advancement is completely futile
Humans are not unique from a biological perspective - we are just a bunch of strings like an operating system
